# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
// Simple PHP Page Router

// Define the templates directory
define('TEMPLATES_DIR', __DIR__ . '/templates/');

// Get the page parameter from the URL
$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : 'home';

// Sanitize the page input to prevent path traversal
$page = basename($page);

// Construct the full path to the template file
$templateFile = TEMPLATES_DIR . $page . '.php';

// Check if the template file exists and is a file
if (file_exists($templateFile) && is_file($templateFile)) {
    include $templateFile;
} else {
    // Include a 404 page or a default page
    include TEMPLATES_DIR . '404.php';
}
?>
